command_results.command: ssh tokyo 'set -eu; REMOTE_HEAD=$(timeout 45 git ls-remote https://github.com/jiangwweie/dingdingbot.git refs/heads/dev | awk '"'"'{print $1; exit}'"'"'); test -n "$REMOTE_HEAD"; test "$REMOTE_HEAD" = cf87320b2c9581c86bb734ba2e7cd783efda67b9'

ssh tokyo 'set -eu; sudo -n systemctl stop brc-owner-console-backend.service; umask 077; set -a; . /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/env/live-readonly.env; set +a; DB_URL="${PG_DATABASE_URL:-${DATABASE_URL:-}}"; test -n "$DB_URL" || { echo PG_DATABASE_URL_or_DATABASE_URL_required >&2; exit 2; }; if command -v pg_dump >/dev/null 2>&1; then pg_dump "$DB_URL" -Fc -f /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/backups/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed.pgdump; else DB_USER=$(/home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -c '"'"'import os; from urllib.parse import urlparse; print(urlparse(os.environ["PG_DATABASE_URL"]).username or "")'"'"'); DB_NAME=$(/home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -c '"'"'import os; from urllib.parse import urlparse; print((urlparse(os.environ["PG_DATABASE_URL"]).path or "/").lstrip("/"))'"'"'); test -n "$DB_USER"; test -n "$DB_NAME"; sudo -n docker exec brc_prelive_pg_20260601 pg_dump -U "$DB_USER" -d "$DB_NAME" -Fc > /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/backups/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed.pgdump; fi; cd /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/releases/brc-runtime-governance-cf87320b-cpm-synthetic-failclosed; set -a; . /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/env/live-readonly.env; set +a; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m compileall -q src; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m alembic heads; PYTHONPATH=$PWD /home/ubuntu/brc-deploy/venvs/brc-bnb-prelive-20260601/bin/python -m alembic upgrade head'
